content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Ran git diff (the worktree diff was empty, so I reviewed the latest committed milestone lifecycle implementation in HEAD), read the milestone lifecycle/model/service/filesystem/CLI paths end-to-end, and ran `cargo test milestone_record::service --lib` plus `cargo test cli::run --lib`. I did not find any correctness, safety, robustness, or significant maintainability issues in the current implementation.

## Amendments

None.
